04

What I Love

Interests & Hobbies

"Life is better when shared with someone who understands your silence."
◆ ◆ ◆

A line that defines how I see companionship — not just in the noise of life, but in its quiet moments too.

— Personal Motto
Classical Music Cooking Travelling Reading Yoga & Fitness Photography Art & Culture Cricket Movies Trekking Dancing Volunteering

When I'm not at work, you'll find me lost in a good book, experimenting in the kitchen, or exploring new places. I practice yoga every morning — it keeps me grounded. I love attending cultural events, classical concerts, and family gatherings. Travel is my biggest passion; I believe every destination teaches something new about life and oneself.

05

My Expectations

Partner Preference

  • Age between 26 – 32 years
  • Well-educated and professionally settled
  • Family-oriented with good values
  • Respectful toward elders and loved ones
  • Open to joint or nuclear family setup
  • Emotionally mature and grounded
  • Caste no bar — character matters more
  • From Gujarat or willing to settle in Gujarat

"I am not looking for perfection — I am looking for someone real. Someone who will laugh with me, grow with me, and face the world with me as a partner and a friend."

— A note to my future partner
